'''fojabaka''' is an [[Aelaki]] [[Adjectives|adjective]] meaning "[[Wikt:spadeable|spadeable]] (auto-generated)".

== Overview ==
{| class="wikitable"
|-
! Root consonants
| f-j-b
|-
! Word class
| [[Adjective]]
|-
! Gloss
| [[Wikt:spadeable|spadeable]] (auto-generated)
|-
! Citation form
| fojabaka
|}

== Agreement paradigm ==
''Positive degree, no evidential.''
{| class="wikitable sortable"
! Gender.Number !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
| [[child]].[[collective]] || [[word:fojabithi|fojabithi]] || [[word:fojabiji|fojabiji]] || [[word:fojabishi|fojabishi]] || [[word:fojabiki|fojabiki]]
|-
| [[child]].[[plural]] || [[word:fojabuthuthu|fojabuthuthu]] || [[word:fojabujuju|fojabujuju]] || [[word:fojabushushu|fojabushushu]] || [[word:fojabukuku|fojabukuku]]
|-
| [[child]].[[singular]] || [[word:fojabuthu|fojabuthu]] || [[word:fojabuju|fojabuju]] || [[word:fojabushu|fojabushu]] || [[word:fojabuku|fojabuku]]
|-
| [[child]].[[zero]] || [[word:fojabufthuf|fojabufthuf]] || [[word:fojabufjuf|fojabufjuf]] || [[word:fojabufshuf|fojabufshuf]] || [[word:fojabufkuf|fojabufkuf]]
|-
| [[female]].[[collective]] || [[word:fojabethe|fojabethe]] || [[word:fojabeje|fojabeje]] || [[word:fojabeshe|fojabeshe]] || [[word:fojabeke|fojabeke]]
|-
| [[female]].[[plural]] || [[word:fojabothotho|fojabothotho]] || [[word:fojabojojo|fojabojojo]] || [[word:fojaboshosho|fojaboshosho]] || [[word:fojabokoko|fojabokoko]]
|-
| [[female]].[[singular]] || [[word:fojabotho|fojabotho]] || [[word:fojabojo|fojabojo]] || [[word:fojabosho|fojabosho]] || [[word:fojaboko|fojaboko]]
|-
| [[female]].[[zero]] || [[word:fojabofthof|fojabofthof]] || [[word:fojabofjof|fojabofjof]] || [[word:fojabofshof|fojabofshof]] || [[word:fojabofkof|fojabofkof]]
|-
| [[inanimate]].[[collective]] || [[word:fojabÃŸfthÃŸf|fojabÃŸfthÃŸf]] || [[word:fojabÃŸfjÃŸf|fojabÃŸfjÃŸf]] || [[word:fojabÃŸfshÃŸf|fojabÃŸfshÃŸf]] || [[word:fojabÃŸfkÃŸf|fojabÃŸfkÃŸf]]
|-
| [[inanimate]].[[plural]] || [[word:fojabÃŸfthÃŸfthÃŸf|fojabÃŸfthÃŸfthÃŸf]] || [[word:fojabÃŸfjÃŸfjÃŸf|fojabÃŸfjÃŸfjÃŸf]] || [[word:fojabÃŸfshÃŸfshÃŸf|fojabÃŸfshÃŸfshÃŸf]] || [[word:fojabÃŸfkÃŸfkÃŸf|fojabÃŸfkÃŸfkÃŸf]]
|-
| [[inanimate]].[[singular]] || [[word:fojabÃŸfthÃŸf|fojabÃŸfthÃŸf]] || [[word:fojabÃŸfjÃŸf|fojabÃŸfjÃŸf]] || [[word:fojabÃŸfshÃŸf|fojabÃŸfshÃŸf]] || [[word:fojabÃŸfkÃŸf|fojabÃŸfkÃŸf]]
|-
| [[inanimate]].[[zero]] || [[word:fojabÃŸfthÃŸf|fojabÃŸfthÃŸf]] || [[word:fojabÃŸfjÃŸf|fojabÃŸfjÃŸf]] || [[word:fojabÃŸfshÃŸf|fojabÃŸfshÃŸf]] || [[word:fojabÃŸfkÃŸf|fojabÃŸfkÃŸf]]
|-
| [[male]].[[collective]] || [[word:fojabÃḊthÃḊ|fojabÃḊthÃḊ]] || [[word:fojabÃḊjÃḊ|fojabÃḊjÃḊ]] || [[word:fojabÃḊshÃḊ|fojabÃḊshÃḊ]] || [[word:fojabÃḊkÃḊ|fojabÃḊkÃḊ]]
|-
| [[male]].[[plural]] || [[word:fojabathatha|fojabathatha]] || [[word:fojabajaja|fojabajaja]] || [[word:fojabashasha|fojabashasha]] || [[word:fojabakaka|fojabakaka]]
|-
| [[male]].[[singular]] || [[word:fojabatha|fojabatha]] || [[word:fojabaja|fojabaja]] || [[word:fojabasha|fojabasha]] || [[word:fojabaka|fojabaka]]
|-
| [[male]].[[zero]] || [[word:fojabafthaf|fojabafthaf]] || [[word:fojabafjaf|fojabafjaf]] || [[word:fojabafshaf|fojabafshaf]] || [[word:fojabafkaf|fojabafkaf]]
|}

== Evidential and TAM forms ==
{| class="wikitable sortable"
! Form !! Surface form
|-
| [[positive]].none || [[word:fojabasha|fojabasha]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[visual]] || [[word:fojabshÃḋsha|fojabshÃḋsha]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[hearsay]] || [[word:fojabrosha|fojabrosha]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[inferential]] || [[word:fojabmusha|fojabmusha]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[optative]] || [[word:fojabyasha|fojabyasha]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[hodiernal]]_[[visual]] || [[word:gofojabnkshÃḋsha|gofojabnkshÃḋsha]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[hodiernal]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:gofojabnkrosha|gofojabnkrosha]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[hodiernal]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gofojabnkmusha|gofojabnkmusha]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[hodiernal]]_[[optative]] || [[word:gofojabnkyasha|gofojabnkyasha]]
|-
| [[comparative]].none || [[word:fojajabasha|fojajabasha]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[visual]] || [[word:fojajabshÃḋsha|fojajabshÃḋsha]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[hearsay]] || [[word:fojajabrosha|fojajabrosha]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[inferential]] || [[word:fojajabmusha|fojajabmusha]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[optative]] || [[word:fojajabyasha|fojajabyasha]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[visual]] || [[word:gofojajabnkshÃḋsha|gofojajabnkshÃḋsha]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:gofojajabnkrosha|gofojajabnkrosha]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gofojajabnkmusha|gofojajabnkmusha]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[optative]] || [[word:gofojajabnkyasha|gofojajabnkyasha]]
|-
| [[superlative]].none || [[word:fejÃḊbasha|fejÃḊbasha]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[visual]] || [[word:fejÃḊbshÃḋsha|fejÃḊbshÃḋsha]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[hearsay]] || [[word:fejÃḊbrosha|fejÃḊbrosha]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[inferential]] || [[word:fejÃḊbmusha|fejÃḊbmusha]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[optative]] || [[word:fejÃḊbyasha|fejÃḊbyasha]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[visual]] || [[word:gofejÃḊbnkshÃḋsha|gofejÃḊbnkshÃḋsha]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:gofejÃḊbnkrosha|gofejÃḊbnkrosha]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gofejÃḊbnkmusha|gofejÃḊbnkmusha]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[optative]] || [[word:gofejÃḊbnkyasha|gofejÃḊbnkyasha]]
|-
| [[negative]].none || [[word:fojfabasha|fojfabasha]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[visual]] || [[word:fojfabshÃḋsha|fojfabshÃḋsha]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[hearsay]] || [[word:fojfabrosha|fojfabrosha]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[inferential]] || [[word:fojfabmusha|fojfabmusha]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[optative]] || [[word:fojfabyasha|fojfabyasha]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[visual]] || [[word:gofojfabnkshÃḋsha|gofojfabnkshÃḋsha]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:gofojfabnkrosha|gofojfabnkrosha]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gofojfabnkmusha|gofojfabnkmusha]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[optative]] || [[word:gofojfabnkyasha|gofojfabnkyasha]]
|}

''36 forms generated.''

== See also ==
* [[Aelaki Lexicon]]

[[Category:Aelaki adjectives]]
[[Category:Aelaki vocabulary]]
[[Category:Aelaki lemmas]]
[[Category:Word pages]]
{{wordpage|0c91cec}}
